title: Special mortgage may be transferred to other property
doc_html:
§201.  Special mortgage may be transferred to other property

All public officers who are required to give bond and have availed themselves of the privilege to give a special mortgage, are authorized to have this mortgage transferred to other property, by applying to the governor in the manner specified in R.S. 42:202.
doc_text:
§201.  Special mortgage may be transferred to other property
All public officers who are required to give bond and have availed themselves of the privilege to give a special mortgage, are authorized to have this mortgage transferred to other property, by applying to the governor in the manner specified in R.S. 42:202.
